name: Sour Cream Pumpkin Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Solid pack Pumpkin (Peeled and P pured)
recipeInstructions:
Cream together the butter, sugar, and vanilla in a mixing bowl. Add eggs, beating well.
In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
Alternately add dry ingredients to butter mixture with sour cream, mixing until just combined.
Beat together pumpkin, beaten egg, sugar, and pie spice.
Pour half of batter into a 9x13-inch baking dish. Spread to the corners.
Sprinkle half of streusel over batter.
Spread pumpkin mixture over streusel.
Carefully spread remaining batter over pumpkin mixture.
Sprinkle with remaining streusel.
Bake at 325°F for 50-60 minutes or until done.
Streusel: Cut sugar into butter. Add cinnamon and nuts, stirring until blended.
